case_title: UNITED CHARTER SERVICE,INC. VS ASIAN AMERICAN ECONOMY/TECHNOLOGY SERVICE CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CHARTER SERVICE,INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ASIAN AMERICAN ECONOMY/TECHNOLOGY SERVICE CO. NO PROOF MADE BY PLTF THAT THEY EVER COMMUNICATED TO DEFT THAT THERE WERE EXTRA CHARGES FOR OVERTIME STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASIAN AMERICAN ECONOMY/TECHNOLOGY SERVICE CO.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $259.86 FILED BY UNITED CHARTER SERVICE,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ASIAN AMERICAN ECONOMY/TECHNOLOGY SERVICE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
